13  108TB Puck06: TCR integration

14 Integrating spatial RNA and TCR data

Commented out some plots to reduce the size of the HTML to under 100MB for Github upload

14.1 Libraries

library(SeuratObject)
Loading required package: sp

Attaching package: 'SeuratObject'

    intersect, t
library(Seurat)
library(anndata)

Attaching package: 'anndata'
The following object is masked from 'package:SeuratObject':

    Layers
library(reticulate)
library(wesanderson)
library(dplyr)

    filter, lag
The following objects are masked from 'package:base':

    intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

library(clustree)

library(reshape2)
library(ggplotify)
library(cowplot)
library(comparator)
library(ggpointdensity)
library(ggvenn)
library(rmarkdown)
library(evaluate)
library(knitr)

source("../source_scripts/slideseq_functions_main.R")

options(Seurat.object.assay.version = 'v5')

14.2 Load virtual environment using reticulate

use_virtualenv("/home/cht269/my_envs/new_envs/R_anndata_py3.13.1/")

14.3 Load RNA puck

P108TB_06_RNA <- load_slideseq(gene_exp_dir = "/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/raw_data/RCC_pucks/2023-07-19_Puck_230206_06_108TB_100M/gene_exp/", coords_dir = "/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/raw_data/RCC_pucks/2023-07-19_Puck_230206_06_108TB_100M/Puck_230206_06_barcode_xy.txt.gz", project_name = "P108TB_06")

dim(P108TB_06_RNA)
[1] 25686 26771

14.4 Load TCR puck

P108TB_06_TCR <- anndata::read_h5ad("/n/data2/dfci/medonc/cwu/chloe/slideseq_data/tcr_analysis/RCC_neovax_pucks/nanoranger_anndata/adata_Puck_230206_06_TCR_108TB.h5ad")
P108TB_06_TCR
AnnData object with n_obs × n_vars = 72 × 53
    obs: 'n_counts', 'n_genes_by_counts', 'total_counts', 'barcode', 'x', 'y'
    var: 'chains', 'cloneCount', 'cloneId', 'nSeqImputedCDR3', 'allVHitsWithScore', 'allDHitsWithScore', 'allJHitsWithScore', 'n_counts', 'n_cells_by_counts', 'mean_counts', 'pct_dropout_by_counts', 'total_counts'
    obsm: 'spatial'

14.5 Remove non-productive CDR3 sequences

all_cdr3 <- P108TB_06_TCR$var_names
all_cdr3 <- all_cdr3[!str_detect(all_cdr3, "_|\\*") & (str_detect(all_cdr3, "^C"))]
P108TB_06_TCR <- P108TB_06_TCR[,all_cdr3]

P108TB_06_TCR$X@x <- round(10^(P108TB_06_TCR$X@x))

14.7 Extract helpful dataframes from TCR anndata object

TCR_seq <- P108TB_06_TCR$var
TCR_xy <- P108TB_06_TCR$obs %>%
  mutate(barcode = paste0(barcode, "-1"),
         x = round(x,1),
         y = round(y,1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("TCR_x" = "x", 
                "TCR_y" = "y", 
                "TCR_barcode" = "barcode")

rownames(TCR_xy) <- TCR_xy$barcode

14.8 Double-check that the coordinate data matches

RNA_xy <- P108TB_06_RNA@images$image@coordinates %>%
  mutate(barcode = rownames(.)) %>%
  dplyr::rename("RNA_x" = "x", 
                "RNA_y" = "y", 
                "RNA_barcode" = "barcode")

rownames(RNA_xy) <- RNA_xy$barcode

RNA_xy %>%
  left_join(TCR_xy, by = c("RNA_barcode" = "TCR_barcode")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(TCR_x)) %>%
  mutate(x_match = case_when(RNA_x == TCR_x ~ TRUE,
                             RNA_x != TCR_x ~ FALSE),
         y_match = case_when(RNA_y == TCR_y ~ TRUE,
                             RNA_y != TCR_y ~ FALSE)) %>%
  count(x_match, y_match)
  x_match y_match  n
1    TRUE    TRUE 42

14.9 How many barcodes gathered from TCR exist in RNA

TCR_xy %>%
  mutate(IN_RNA = case_when((TCR_barcode %in% RNA_xy$RNA_barcode) ~ TRUE,
                            !(TCR_barcode %in% RNA_xy$RNA_barcode) ~ FALSE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = IN_RNA)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling1")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads from TCR pipeline in RNA")

14.10 Assign all TCR barcodes to an RNA barcode

final_xy <- map_tcr_and_rna_barcodes(TCR_xy, RNA_xy)
[1] "Do matching barcodes share the same location? TRUE 42"
[1] "Number of rows: 72"
[1] "Number of distinct TCR barcodes: 72"
[1] "Number of distinct RNA barcodes: 70"

14.11 Add the TCR data to the RNA as an additional assay

P108TB_06_RNA <- update_and_add_tcr_assay(P108TB_06_TCR, final_xy, P108TB_06_RNA)
[1] "Sanity: Number of same TCRs between xy coordinate DF and counts matrix: 72"
[1] "Sanity: Total TCR counts from original TCR matrix: 99368"
[1] "Sanity: Total TCR counts from new TCR matrix: 99368"

14.12 Calculate Hamming distance between TCR barcodes and RNA barcodes

hamming_option = Hamming()
final_xy <- final_xy %>%
  mutate(hamming_dist = hamming_option(TCR_barcode, RNA_barcode))

14.13 Plot distribution of physical distance and Hamming distance of TCR-unique barcodes

final_xy %>%
  filter(TCR_barcode != RNA_barcode) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = distance, y = hamming_dist)) +
    geom_pointdensity() + 
  theme_classic() +
  xlab("physical distance") +
  ylab("hamming distance")

14.14 Plot number of beads w/ clonotype data

P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  mutate(TCR = case_when((nFeature_TCR > 0) ~ TRUE,
                         (nFeature_TCR == 0) ~ FALSE)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = TCR)) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling1")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads w/ TCR")

14.15 Plot number of beads w/ multiple TCR chains

P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(nFeature_TCR > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = 1, fill = as.factor(nFeature_TCR))) + 
  geom_bar() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = wes_palette("Darjeeling2")) +
  theme_classic() +
  ggtitle("No. of beads w/ multiple TCR")

14.16 Open reactivity and scRNA-scTCR derived phenotypic data

reactivities <- read.csv("../objects/reformatted_RCC_slideseq_parameters_052925.csv") %>%
  filter(str_detect(sctcr_clone, "p108"))

14.17 Attach single cell derived clonotype descriptions to TCR metadata

TCR_seq <- TCR_seq %>%
  mutate(CDR3 = rownames(.)) %>%
  left_join(reactivities, by = c("chains", "CDR3"))

14.18 Create a summary of clonotypes per bead in object metadata

P108TB_06_RNA <- add_CDR3s_to_RNA_md(P108TB_06_RNA)
[1] "Sanity check: Summarized CDR3s properly? TRUE"
puck_specific_scTCR_clones <- get_puck_specific_sctcr_clones(TCR_seq, reactivities)

P108TB_06_RNA <- attach_phenotype_specificity_to_RNA_md(puck_specific_scTCR_clones, P108TB_06_RNA)

P108TB_06_RNA <- create_final_clone_ids(P108TB_06_RNA, reactivities)

14.19 Log scale the rna and tcr features and umi

P108TB_06_RNA$log_nFeature_TCR <- log(P108TB_06_RNA$nFeature_TCR)
P108TB_06_RNA$log_nCount_TCR <- log(P108TB_06_RNA$nCount_TCR)
P108TB_06_RNA$log_nFeature_Spatial <- log(P108TB_06_RNA$nFeature_Spatial)
P108TB_06_RNA$log_nCount_Spatial <- log(P108TB_06_RNA$nCount_Spatial)

14.20 Plot TCR distribution spatially

SpatialFeaturePlot(P108TB_06_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_TCR", "log_nCount_TCR"), pt.size = 3, alpha = c(0.5,1))
SpatialFeaturePlot(P108TB_06_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_Spatial", "log_nCount_Spatial"), pt.size = 3, alpha = c(0.5,1))

14.21 Calculate clonal expansion per clonotype

# Count up clones
puck06_108TB_clone_id_count <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
  filter(!is.na(clone_id)) %>%
  pull(clone_id) %>%
  paste0(collapse = ",") %>%
  str_split_1(fixed(",")) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  dplyr::rename("clone_id" = ".") %>%
  dplyr::count(clone_id) %>%
  dplyr::rename("puck06_count" = "n")

clone_counts.df <- data.frame()
  # Remove non-TCR containing beads
  puck_T <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
    filter(nFeature_TCR > 0)
  # Beads can have multiple TCRs- assign the largest count
  for(i in c(1:nrow(puck_T))){
    # Get the clones/CDR3 associated with each barcode
    associated_clones <- puck_T[i,"clone_id"] %>%
      str_split_1(",")
    # Find these clones in the total counts df and pick whichever clone is the largest
    associated_counts <- puck06_108TB_clone_id_count %>%
      filter(clone_id %in% associated_clones) %>%
      filter(puck06_count == max(puck06_count)) %>%
      slice_head(n = 1) %>%
      dplyr::rename("largest_clone_id" = "clone_id") %>%
      select(largest_clone_id, puck06_count) %>%
      mutate(log_puck06_count = log10(puck06_count))
    # Push this barcode, it's associated clone and counts to a dataframe
    new_row <- cbind(associated_counts, barcode = puck_T[i,"barcode"])
    clone_counts.df <- rbind(clone_counts.df, new_row)
  }
  
  # Update metadata of the puck
  P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data %>%
    full_join(clone_counts.df, by = "barcode") %>%
    mutate(puck06_count = case_when(is.na(puck06_count) ~ 0,
                                    !is.na(puck06_count) ~ puck06_count),
           log_puck06_count = case_when(is.na(log_puck06_count) ~ 0,
                                      !is.na(log_puck06_count) ~ log_puck06_count))
  
  rownames(P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data) <- P108TB_06_RNA@meta.data$barcode
  
P108TB_06_RNA %>% 
  subset(nFeature_TCR > 0) %>%
SpatialFeaturePlot(features = "log_puck06_count", pt.size = 3, stroke = 0.1, alpha = 0.5) + scale_fill_viridis()
Warning: Not validating Seurat objects
Scale for fill is already present.
Adding another scale for fill, which will replace the existing scale.

14.22 Flip the XY coordinates to match the orientation of the H&E stain

P108TB_06_xy <- P108TB_06_RNA@images$image@coordinates

# flip vertically
P108TB_06_xy <- P108TB_06_xy %>%
  dplyr::rename("orig_x" = "x",
                "orig_y" = "y") %>%
  mutate(x = -orig_x+5000,
         y = orig_y) %>%
  select(-orig_x,-orig_y)

P108TB_06_RNA@images$image@coordinates <- P108TB_06_xy

# SpatialFeaturePlot(P108TB_06_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_Spatial", "log_nCount_TCR"), alpha = c(0,1))
# 
# SpatialFeaturePlot(P108TB_06_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_TCR", "log_nCount_TCR"), pt.size = 2, alpha = c(0.5,1))
# SpatialFeaturePlot(P108TB_06_RNA, features = c("log_nFeature_Spatial", "log_nCount_Spatial"), pt.size = 2, alpha = c(0.5,1))

14.23 Save merged object

saveRDS(P108TB_06_RNA, "01_Puck06_108TB_TCR_RNA_merged_110724.Rds")
